prompts.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

prompts.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
prompts.transliteration: Wa maa khalaqtul jinna wal insa illaa liya'budoon
prompts.translation: I did not create jinn and humans except to worship Me. (51:56)
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest. (13:28)
